review_title: Great product with exceptionally high levels of customer support. Highly recommended.
author: David S.
pros: Customer support - they have been consistently available and very patient. Functionality - streamlined our timesheet/paycycle/invoicing process Reporting - great, user friendly reports
cons: There have not been any downsides to FoundU's products or service as yet, keep up the good work guys.

review_title: Great system, onboarding to rostering to payroll all in 1!
description: Excellent. The team from sales, to implementation to customer support have always been amazing. They have a very high standard for their client relations. Learning a system can be hard but they're very patient people!
author: Carina R.
pros: They rostering to timesheets to payroll features are great. The team are very friendly, customer service is very quick to respond and helpful. Great Q&A feature to help use the platform when you're figuring things out.
cons: System is great although it would be nice to have a few more different reports or something to assist with WGEA reporting.

description: Overall, foundU made HR and payroll tasks much easier, offering a user-friendly, efficient, and reliable experience.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I loved foundU’s seamless interface and intuitive features—tracking attendance, payroll, and HR tasks felt effortless and truly time-saving.
cons: The occasional slow load times and limited customization options made some tasks less efficient than expected.

description: Excellent platform for managing a small or large team. Password protected and the 2FA brings another level of security level. Highly user friendly. May be build AI into this and suggest shifts that are re occurring. I have not had an instance where I found a bug or required a fix.
author: Ramees M.
pros: It’s very straightforward and easy to use. I love the copy paste options when creating shifts. The dashboards are easy to understand weekly requirement for rosters. Value for money. Automated shift copying and paste
cons: Everyone in the managerial access make to see other department leave applications and balance. Leave application can be slightly manual when approving. Never had to call customer support.

description: Very good. Easy to approve shifts, edit payslips and reprocess if any errors occur. Implementation team should employ HR that knows the Awards, to help identify any errors during set up.
author: Emma W.
pros: Makes payroll a breeze! Fairy easy to set up, rule based system. Make sure you know the rules that apply.
cons: Implementation consultant was new, so more time consuming than should've been. Need a computer based login, so you dont have to buy an ipad

description: So far it has been a wonderful experience, great customer service team. Shout out to [sensitive content hidden] and team, always there to resolve any issues quickly.
author: Kanwar S.
pros: Very easy and quick for rostering and payroll. Additionally very helpful in keeping the track of employee compliance is a great tool.
cons: Nothing major, but the system glitch resulting in, not able to use the platform in the desired way. Apart from that it is a very userfreindly system to use

description: I like using it and will recommend it to anyone else looking for a good application for multiple staff.
author: Katherine H.
pros: Ease of setting weekly rosters, and approving shifts weekly. Colours help as well. Clock in and out is smooth.
cons: Nothing I used to find it clunky but the latest version is smoother and more accurate in gps location.

description: Great experience with lots of features, easy to deal with the customer service staff. I finished my training with FoundU and realised I was underutilising the software.
author: Sahaj P.
pros: The FoundU is easy to use, which also includes understanding of roster demand and allocation of roles and responsibilities
cons: The system slows down while loading a huge dataset. It's best to use the filter option to open multiple rosters.

review_title: Foundu - a must platform for every business!
description: As a team our overall experience with Foundu has been wonderful. Clocking in and out for employees is accurate daily. It allows management reporting tools to track management records and report on attendance where needed.
author: Emma T.
pros: Foundu is an easy to use platform for all teams. Scheduling and payroll is a breeze along with employee management and record keeping. Employee attendance tracking is perfect!
cons: I don't believe there is anything that i cant fault with the Foundu platform, all in all i give it 100 percent.

description: Extremely positive. We run a 45-person business across 4 locations with this product and it serves us very well.
author: David S.
pros: It is highly intuitive. Provides features across a broad range of corporate functions. Staff find it useful and easy to understand.
cons: Minor issues only. Some abnormal payroll items can be laborious to add. This isn't unexpected though.

description: My experience with foundU over the past six months has been fantastic. The platform's user-friendly interface has made workforce management incredibly smooth and efficient. From onboarding to rostering and payroll, everything is intuitive and streamlined, saving me significant time and effort. The real-time insights and compliance features give me peace of mind, knowing everything aligns with Australian regulations.
author: Shisheer M.
pros: foundU streamlines our entire workforce management process with its all-in-one platform. The user-friendly interface makes onboarding, rostering, and payroll a breeze, saving us significant time and effort. The real-time wage cost tracking and intuitive scheduling tools help optimize our operations, while the native payroll calculator ensures compliance with Australian regulations, reducing administrative stress.
cons: In my six months using foundU, I haven’t come across any significant issues that restrict or hinder my work.

review_title: Foundu is a game changer and time saver
description: Easy to navigate around. The customisation and preferences you can use to view what you need.
author: Lana F.
pros: Very easy to use. I love that you can drag employee shifts over from one employee to another. I love that you can copy and paste shifts and the award test is the cherry on top
cons: That I cannot copy and past a roster from one week to another week for one employee only

description: Overall it was a very good experience , specially the screen designs and the data validation feature . I did like the workflow as well
author: JOSEPH A.
pros: Cloud based , all in one , fully integrated , perfect for labor hire . specially if you are looking for invoicing .
cons: there nothing in the platform which I did not like , it is very good platform for workforce management
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Efficient in use, user friendly interface
description: Convenient, efficient, copy roasted feature is best
author: Anisha V.
pros: Hours and wages calculator, public day updates
cons: Need more colours on the roaster, deleting shifts

description: I am very satisfied with FoundU compared to other payroll applications.
author: Sarad G.
pros: User friendly and easy to manage. Budget allocation for weekly and daily roster makes it easy to stay within the budget. Best thing is Admin can apply for staff's leave when they cannot for some reasons.
cons: Auto approval which doesn't work sometimes.

description: Overall I’m happy with FoundU. it takes a lot of stress out of managing staff and makes my job easier.
author: Beatriz F.
pros: I love how FoundU makes payroll and rostering simple. It saves me hours every week and keeps everything in one place.
cons: Sometimes moving between menus is slow, which can be a bit frustrating when I’m in a hurry. But this doesn’t happen a lot
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Found U - User friendly payroll platform
description: We have been using Found U for the past 4 plus years and the platform has grown from strength to strength with it's features and ease of use. We recommend it to most of our clients now as it is 'End to End' for HR and Payroll requirements and stays up to date on all compliance and Fairwork requirements.
author: Jane F.
pros: It is a very user friendly platform, with fantastic features for rostering, timesheet approvals, and reports. The Support is also very quick and helpful which is so refreshing compared to other payroll platforms.
cons: At first the reports BUT in the past 6 months the reports have greatly improved and our client are very impressed with the data we can now export.

description: I actually enjoy using it. Very easy to use.
author: Eddie G.
pros: Ease of use. Easy to follow steps and layout.
cons: I would like to add notes prior to approving. Now, if you add a note you have to approve the shift..

author: Donna M.
pros: This program is a complete software program for your Payroll & HR requirements. Very user friendly & time saving. The support team go above and beyond, they are always very helpful and happy to assist.
cons: To date I am unable think of anything that I am not satisfied with.

description: The customer support from Foundu set them apart from their competitors.
author: Nicky S.
pros: Foundu is a great all in one platform that allows us to look after the entire employee life cycle in one system. Streamlining admin tasks that allows us to focus on time with our people.
cons: Nothing the platform has been great for our business needs.

author: Jake Y.
pros: foundU is quick and easy to use. It makes the weekly pays a breeze. Rarely are there any issues, ad if there are the resource articles are so easy to follow and 9/10 times you can easily find what you need.
cons: Ability for the app to work on mobile devices when there is no phone service or Wi-Fi would be great. If the employees could still clock on and off and it sends the update when they have connection again would help out immensely. Also a security update is needed that stops the app on personal devices using the device time and date settings which could be wrong or easily changed by a dishonest employee.

description: Greatly minimised time required for payroll processing. Also created a smoother flow of the rostering and shift approval process. Greatly added to the efficiency of management and finance processes. Support staff were also impeccable and greatly assisted in the set-up process.
author: Tanya K.
pros: Intuitive design makes it easy to use and a breeze to integrate into an established workflow. It also allows for staff with widely varying levels of software proficiency to learn to use the program in no time.
cons: It would be useful to be able to view the shifts for a week all together on one page rather than only one day at a time in the approved shifts section.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Jennifer D.
pros: Ease of use, user friendly for onboarding staff.
cons: Reporting, search function is a bit clunky

author: Reese B.
pros: The personalised implementation and support. The product suits all our need fro m recruitment, Applicant tracking and job rostering. The compliant payroll system allows me to relax in a very difficult employment law jurisdiction. Our margins have increased significantly since we adopted the product
